name: obsidian-agent-skills
description: Obsidian-backed workflow skills for initializing agent project memory and extracting reusable lessons.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize project memory and extract reusable Obsidian lessons
interface.longDescription: Use Obsidian Agent Skills to initialize Obsidian-backed agent project conventions with obinit and extract reusable project lessons into Obsidian knowledge notes with oblearn.
defaultPrompt: 使用 $obinit 初始化当前项目。
使用 $oblearn 从当前项目提取可复用公共知识。
